name: Resatorvid
description: Resatorvid is an investigational compound designed for the treatment of severe sepsis.
indication: Investigated for use/treatment in sepsis and septicemia.
mechanismOfAction: TAK-242 suppresses production of inflammatory mediators such as cytokine by inhibiting the signal transduction through Toll-like receptor 4 (TLR4) which is one of the receptors recognizing the bacterial components.
